title: genista tridens subsp. juniperina
intro: Genista tridens subsp. juniperina, also known as the Spanish broom or juniper genista, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues and as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Genista tridens subsp. juniperina include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and aiding in the treatment of urinary problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea or used as a tincture, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and gout.
